root.m_Talk_ENG: Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pavlin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If a time comes when you can't bear it anymore, go find Terrabrain that sealed my fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If a time comes when you can't bear it anymore, go find Terrabrain that sealed my fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If a time comes when you can't bear it anymore, go find Terrabrain that sealed my fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And make time flow again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And make time flow again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And make time flow again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if I let time flow... the world will collapse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if I let time flow... the world will collapse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if I let time flow... the world will collapse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the passage of time consumes possibilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the passage of time consumes possibilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the passage of time consumes possibilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When it comes to that, use my fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When it comes to that, use my fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When it comes to that, use my fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the possibilities within my fate, it'll be enough to guarantee the future of the two of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the possibilities within my fate, it'll be enough to guarantee the future of the two of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the possibilities within my fate, it'll be enough to guarantee the future of the two of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That must be saved for the future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That must be saved for the future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That must be saved for the future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How could I use your last request... for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How could I use your last request... for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How could I use your last request... for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This plan wouldn't have been possible without your help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This plan wouldn't have been possible without your help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This plan wouldn't have been possible without your help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you... have a right to choose a brighter future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you... have a right to choose a brighter future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you... have a right to choose a brighter future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for saying that, Master.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for saying that, Master.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for saying that, Master.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if I had to give up one future...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if I had to give up one future...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if I had to give up one future...

root.m_Talk_ENG: My decision would be to...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My decision would be to...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My decision would be to...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're almost there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're almost there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're almost there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can make it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can make it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can make it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The star in the night sky shined down light.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The star in the night sky shined down light.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The star in the night sky shined down light.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And we ran toward it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And we ran toward it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And we ran toward it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother wasn't wrong when she said that stars make wishes come true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother wasn't wrong when she said that stars make wishes come true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother wasn't wrong when she said that stars make wishes come true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this really... the ending that I so desperately wanted?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this really... the ending that I so desperately wanted?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this really... the ending that I so desperately wanted?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>...Solovey...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>...Solovey...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>...Solovey...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: This voice...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This voice...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This voice...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just ignore it! We're almost there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just ignore it! We're almost there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just ignore it! We're almost there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Stay... with me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Stay... with me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Stay... with me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?! Why can't I move?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?! Why can't I move?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?! Why can't I move?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it trying to isolate and trap us?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it trying to isolate and trap us?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it trying to isolate and trap us?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can feel it. This power is on a completely different level than mine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can feel it. This power is on a completely different level than mine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can feel it. This power is on a completely different level than mine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be able to break out of this isolation by myself, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't be able to break out of this isolation by myself, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be able to break out of this isolation by myself, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will be able to hold it for a brief moment before it closes completely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will be able to hold it for a brief moment before it closes completely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will be able to hold it for a brief moment before it closes completely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Vines...?! Are you going to throw me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Vines...?! Are you going to throw me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Vines...?! Are you going to throw me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time! You go first!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time! You go first!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time! You go first!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A... broken sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A... broken sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A... broken sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey?! Hey...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey?! Hey...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey?! Hey...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Take the treasure with you, Parry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Take the treasure with you, Parry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Take the treasure with you, Parry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
think I can make
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
think I can make
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
think I can make
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kid...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kid...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kid...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect it to isolate the space at this point...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect it to isolate the space at this point...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect it to isolate the space at this point...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay, Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay, Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay, Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going anywhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going anywhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going anywhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't leave you alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't leave you alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't leave you alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Aaaaaah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Aaaaaah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Aaaaaah...
